name: Noodle Stories Host

securitySheaf.label: Nosy Regular Probe
securitySheaf.effect: A regular's icon looks up from a bowl and starts asking why the decker is in the wrong room.

securitySheaf.label: Receipt-Tape Trace
securitySheaf.effect: Receipt tape unspools from the register and starts crawling back toward the decker's access path.

securitySheaf.label: Passive Alert: Room Goes Quiet
securitySheaf.effect: The host gets suspicious. Subsystem ratings effectively rise under alert conditions; public icons keep eating noodles like nothing happened.

encounter.consequence: Passive Alert: Noodle Stories regulars and staff may become uneasy if the decker keeps pushing. Notify the GM if unresolved pressure remains at run end.

securitySheaf.label: Spilled-Broth Scramble
securitySheaf.effect: Ink runs, poem pages blur, and copied files risk becoming partial or noisy.

securitySheaf.label: Sticky Noodle Tar Baby
securitySheaf.effect: Doughy noodles and a jammed staff curtain try to hold the icon long enough for human response.

securitySheaf.label: Auntie Static Warning Ping
securitySheaf.effect: A back-room signal minder or trusted regular receives a warning that the host has an intruder.

encounter.consequence: Auntie Static Warning Ping: Noodle Stories staff or trusted regulars may receive a usable alert about the intrusion. Notify the GM if this remains unresolved.

sculpting: A cluttered noodle counter after midnight: steam, paper lanterns, hand-lettered specials, receipt tape, zine racks, poem broadsides, and open-mic flyers. Deeper collective material hides behind coded menu specials, flyer serials, and back-room radio static.
notes: Blue-5 Noodle Stories host for Decker Experience playtesting. Public side is harmless. Private side hides concrete result nodes for camera access, sales records, catered-party history, and bespoke viral pasta recipe diversion. A harder anti-government archive layer can reveal sensitive collective materials. The final very-high-TN route exposes an NPD backdoor/surveillance implant.

nodes.title: Arts District Grid Outside Noodle Stories
nodes.description: You hover in Nashville's arts-district grid among gallery announcements, bootleg show flyers, food-order pings, and the warm steam-signature of Noodle Stories. The host offers a public customer surface and a quieter staff-only curtain.

nodes.title: Public Counter
nodes.description: Steam curls over a bright counter icon. Menu boards, hours, public flyers, sanitized zines, and open-mic notices hang where customers can see them. This side is noisy, harmless, and deliberately thin.

nodes.title: Public Menu Board
nodes.description: Broth specials, noodle sizes, tea prices, and a few jokes about landlords scroll across a hand-lettered board. Good flavor, no secrets.

nodes.title: Public Flyer Wall
nodes.description: Public readings, benefit nights, gallery shows, and open-mic titles are visible here. The radical stuff is poetic enough to be legal and vague enough to be useless by itself.

nodes.title: Public Zine Rack
nodes.description: Cheap chapbooks, public broadsides, and mutual-aid pamphlets are arranged in a milk crate. They say plenty about attitude, not much about operations.

nodes.title: Back Counter Staff Hub
nodes.description: Behind the curtain, the sculpting turns practical: prep sheets, grease-stained binders, delivery envelopes, camera bulbs, kitchen order screens, and a half-busted stage mic. This is the useful layer.

choices.label: Plant or alter a menu signal
Back out to the public counter

nodes.title: Shop Records and Ledger Hub
nodes.description: Receipt strips, order tickets, comp ledgers, catering envelopes, and recipe notebooks flutter around a scarred prep table. Pick what you are searching before the host notices the pattern.

nodes.title: Sales Records Access
nodes.description: You appear to have access to sales records: meal tabs, comped bowls, suspicious bulk orders, late-night register timing, and staff shorthand in the margins. Tell the GM you have sales-record access; confirm what names, dates, or order patterns are visible.

report.title: Sales records access
report.detail: Mevin reached Noodle Stories sales records. Confirm visible dates, tabs, suspicious orders, comped meals, and usable order-pattern leads with the GM.

choices.label: Log off with sales records noted

nodes.title: History of Catered Parties
nodes.description: You appear to have access to catering history: party names, delivery windows, back-room events, benefit nights, and a few clients who wanted the food but not the publicity. Tell the GM you have catered-party history; ask which events or hosts matter.

report.title: Catered-party history access
report.detail: Mevin reached Noodle Stories catered-party history. Confirm party names, delivery windows, benefit nights, and privacy-sensitive client/event details with the GM.

choices.label: Log off with catering history noted

nodes.title: Bespoke Viral Pasta Recipe Queue
nodes.description: A little recipe queue hides behind hand-lettered menu specials: chile crisp noodle variants, sponsor-safe names, allergy notes, and novelty pasta concepts engineered to be photographed and copied.

choices.label: Divert a bespoke viral pasta recipe

nodes.title: Permanent Outcome: Viral Pasta Recipe Diverted
nodes.description: You divert or redirect a bespoke viral pasta recipe before it hits the menu/social loop. Notify the GM: this is a permanent campaign-state change. Specify whether the recipe was copied, suppressed, rerouted, renamed, or pointed at a different recipient.

report.title: Viral pasta recipe diverted
report.detail: Mevin changed the bespoke viral pasta recipe queue. Tell the GM whether the recipe was copied, suppressed, rerouted, renamed, or assigned to a different recipient.

choices.label: Log off before menu audit catches up

nodes.title: Paydata: Sales Pattern Notes
nodes.description: You recover modest local paydata from sales records: suspicious bulk orders, recurring comped tabs, late-night timing, or a pattern of meals tied to arts-district pressure. Tell the GM you recovered Noodle Stories sales-pattern paydata.

nodes.title: Paydata: Catering Route Notes
nodes.description: You recover modest local paydata from catered-party history: privacy-sensitive client/event traces, delivery windows, and social links around benefit nights. Tell the GM you recovered Noodle Stories catering-route paydata.

nodes.title: Paydata: Recipe Development Notes
nodes.description: You copy recipe-development notes: supplier tricks, novelty names, allergy constraints, and social-spread timing. It is small, weird, locally useful paydata. Tell the GM you recovered bespoke recipe paydata.

nodes.title: Shop Device Controls
nodes.description: Cheap cameras, a door chime, sign lights, kitchen order displays, a tiny speaker bus, and the stage mic all hang off the host with more personality than hardening.

nodes.title: Camera Network Access
nodes.description: You appear to have access to the shop camera network or camera-record index. Tell the GM you have camera-network access; confirm which feeds are live, stored, missing, delayed, spoofed, or deliberately pointed at useless walls.

report.title: Camera network access
report.detail: Mevin reached Noodle Stories camera access. Confirm visible feeds, stored windows, blind spots, missing cameras, and whether any feed is delayed or spoofed with the GM.

choices.label: Search camera gaps for suspicious watchers
Log off with camera access noted

nodes.title: Door Chime and Sign Light Access
nodes.description: You appear to have access to the door chime, sign lights, and a few cheap presence cues. Tell the GM you have door-chime/sign access; confirm whether any change would be noticed physically.

report.title: Door chime and sign light access
report.detail: Mevin reached Noodle Stories door chime/sign light controls. Confirm physical scope and whether changes would be noticed with the GM.

choices.label: Log off with device access noted

nodes.title: Stage Mic and Speaker Bus Access
nodes.description: You appear to have access to the tiny stage mic and speaker bus. Tell the GM you have audio-system access; confirm whether it can record, broadcast, distort, or only play house sound.

report.title: Stage mic and speaker access
report.detail: Mevin reached Noodle Stories stage mic/speaker bus. Confirm whether it records, broadcasts, distorts, or only plays house sound with the GM.

choices.label: Log off with audio access noted

nodes.title: Paydata: Camera Gap Pattern
nodes.description: You recover a small but concrete camera-gap pattern: useful timestamps, blank spots, weird maintenance windows, or repeated watcher positions. Tell the GM you recovered camera-gap paydata.

nodes.title: Permanent Outcome: Menu Signal Edited
nodes.description: You alter a menu special, flyer refrain, or other deniable signal. Notify the GM: this is a permanent campaign-state change and may send the wrong message to the wrong person.

report.title: Menu/flyer signal edited
report.detail: Mevin altered a Noodle Stories menu/flyer signal. Tell the GM what changed and who might read the signal.

nodes.title: Coded Collective Seam
nodes.description: Menu jokes, poem titles, flyer serials, and a little AM-radio hiss line up into a back-room routing grammar. This is not a second locked door to the same room; it is a discovered seam into a harder, more sensitive archive layer.

choices.label: Package the seam as a clue and retreat

nodes.title: Anti-Government Materials Archive
nodes.description: The noodle-shop sculpting drops into a dim back room full of paper, radio static, legal-defense notes, protest poetry, copied pamphlets, and annotated rumors about local authority. It is much better protected than the menu board.

choices.label: Return to the coded collective seam

nodes.title: Anti-Government Materials Cache
nodes.description: You recover access to sensitive anti-government materials: protest poems, pamphlet drafts, legal-defense notes, and annotated claims about local/federal pressure. Tell the GM you reached the anti-government materials cache; exact contents and consequences are GM-facing.

report.title: Anti-government materials cache accessed
report.detail: Mevin reached Noodle Stories' sensitive anti-government materials cache. GM should provide exact protest/legal-defense/pressure details and any source-safety consequences.

choices.label: Log off with anti-government materials noted

nodes.title: Mutual-Aid Warning Lists
nodes.description: You recover access to warning lists: suspicious vehicles, plainclothes harassment, venue pressure, landlord probes, and names the collective is trying not to expose. Tell the GM you reached the warning lists; handle source-safety carefully.

report.title: Mutual-aid warning lists accessed
report.detail: Mevin reached Noodle Stories warning lists. GM should provide suspicious vehicle/plainclothes/venue-pressure/landlord-probe details and flag source-safety risks.

nodes.title: Very High-TN Doorway: Buried NPD Backdoor
nodes.description: Behind the collective archive is one last almost-invisible doorway. You reveal a buried Nashville PD backdoor into the Noodle Stories system, with signs of monitoring hooks and surveillance interest in the collective. Alert the GM immediately: NPD has the group under surveillance through this host.

report.title: Nashville PD backdoor revealed
report.detail: Mevin revealed a buried Nashville PD backdoor/surveillance hook in the Noodle Stories host. GM should treat NPD surveillance of the collective as confirmed and decide what logs, access level, and current monitoring are visible.

choices.label: Copy proof of the NPD backdoor
Get out before the watcher notices

nodes.title: Proof: NPD Surveillance Backdoor
nodes.description: You copy enough proof to show the NPD backdoor exists: route fingerprints, access timestamps, watcher hooks, or surveillance configuration fragments. Tell the GM you have proof of NPD surveillance access to Noodle Stories.

report.title: Proof of NPD surveillance backdoor copied
report.detail: Mevin copied proof of the Nashville PD backdoor into Noodle Stories: route fingerprints, access timestamps, watcher hooks, or surveillance config fragments. Notify the GM.

choices.label: Log off with NPD backdoor proof

nodes.title: Graceful Logoff
nodes.description: The decker backs out through the noodle-shop sculpting and closes the session cleanly. Tell the GM what concrete access, copied data, permanent changes, or NPD surveillance proof was recovered.
